privileged_info_summary: The task.json file contains NO metadata field. The task creates a table named 'Promotions' in the Chinook database, which is a real, well-known public database (from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). The Chinook database contains 275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 59 customers, and 412 invoices. The data is NOT synthetic: media information comes from real iTunes library data, customer/employee records are fictitious with realistic details, and sales data spans four years. All numeric claims stated in the environment metadata (env.json) have been independently verified against the official Chinook database.
